fields.System.Title: Quote status "Pending" should read "Draft"
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.TCM.ReproSteps:
Current: Pending
Expected: Draft
Why: 'Pending' implies awaiting approval; 'Draft' implies work-in-progress.

fields.System.Title: Navigation "My Fleet" should read "Makes"
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.TCM.ReproSteps:
Current: My Fleet
Expected: Makes
Why: Portal label maps to the CRM 'Makes' entity.

fields.System.Title: Add "Military" flag to the Quote form (compliance)
fields.System.Description: Gap: the portal Quote form has no Military flag present in CRM.
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria:
• Military (Yes/No) field added to the Quote form
  • Submits to the corresponding CRM field

fields.System.Title: Implement: Add "Military" flag to the Quote form
fields.System.Description:

  • Add Military (Yes/No) field to the Quote form (UI): 2h
